alert_first_run.message: Iwara Downloader has been installed. Please configure the filename and save folder settings on the options page, then make sure to save.
alert_first_run.description: Notification displayed when the extension is installed for the first time.

manifest_addon_desc.message: A browser extension for easy video downloading from Iwara.

manifest_command_desc.message: Download the video on the current page.

filename_setting_description1.message: Set the filename used when saving.

format_username.message: Name of the user who uploaded the video

format_userid.message: ID of the user who uploaded the video

format_saved_yeartwodigits.message: Year at time of saving (last 2 digits)

savelocation_description1.message: Sets the path after the download folder configured in Firefox.

savelocation_description2.message: The download folder set in Firefox is the value of 'Save files to' found at 'about:preferences#general' in the browser.

savelocation_description3.message: For example, if 'Save files to' is 'P:\Downloads' and the configured path is 'Iwara_Downloader/$UserName$/', the file will be saved to 'P:\Downloads\Iwara_Downloader\user\filename.mp4'.

savelocation_description4.message: Use a forward slash '/' as the folder separator.

savelocation_description5.message: Relative paths such as '../' and './' cannot be used.

autodown_description.message: Always show a download confirmation dialog before saving.

autolike_description.message: Automatically click the Like button when downloading.

update_notes_important_title.message: ⚠️ After updating, please make sure to check the following.

update_notes_important_desc.message:
The format settings have been changed due to the update.
The previously configured formats can no longer be used, so please set them up again according to your environment.

update_notes_new_desc.message: Download via keyboard shortcut has been added. The default shortcut is 'Alt+Shift+Z'.

update_notes_imp_desc.message:
From now on, each update will display a popup window summarizing what has changed.
Update history can also be viewed from the settings page.

update_notes_bug_desc.message:
Fixed a bug where date formatting would not work correctly when both 'Private' and 'Unlisted' properties were present.
Also fixed a bug where second-level date formatting was not working.
